fields.name: source
fields.label: Query Index
fields.description: Path to the query index to search (defaults to /query-index.json)

fields.name: recent
fields.label: Recent Search Suggestions
fields.description: Comma-separated fallback terms shown under "Recent search" until the visitor has their own search history

fields.name: mostSearched
fields.label: Most Searched Links
fields.description: One link per line as: Label | /path | icon  (icon is one of card, cash, bank, search)
